data.body: FORCE_CLOSE: close gate(s) bypassed by user approval — no completion/signature attestation was signed. Reason: "Operator chose apply-prove-rollback scope (confirmed via question): the deploy-key-only lock was APPLIED + EMPIRICALLY PROVEN on the live navapbc/rebar (human push, force-push, PR-merge incl --admin, tag push, deletion all REJECTED), then ROLLED BACK to restore main-protection (verified == snapshot). The permanent-cutover ACs (live PRs/Issues/Actions disabled, README/About mirror banner, root CONTRIBUTING.md replacing PR guidance, GitHub-PR guidance removed) are DELIBERATELY NOT applied — they would misrepresent the rolled-back repo and change the team's live workflow, which the operator did not opt into. The full cutover playbook (feature toggles, banner text, Gerrit-only contributor workflow) is committed in infra/runbooks/github-mirror-lock.md for the eventual real cutover. Lock mechanism + rollback are proven; closed-without-signature reflects the intentionally-deferred permanent-cutover steps.". Session: d6f23ff8.
